title: Nike India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Nike India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Nike India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Navi Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Nike India:
Nike India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nike India!
